info.name: VS — UC2: EV Fleet Driver KYC (Aadhaar eKYC)
info.description:
## Verification Service Network — UC2: EV Fleet Driver KYC

**Scenario:** GreenMove EV Fleet Operations (Requesting NP) performs Aadhaar
eKYC on driver applicant Priya Sharma via IDVerify Solutions (Provider NP) for
KYC compliance before onboarding her to the fleet. Real-time UIDAI OTP flow;
result returned synchronously at on_confirm within PT5M.

**Protocol:** Beckn v2.0.0 + Verification Service schema pack v2.1.0
**Verification type:** IDENTITY (Aadhaar eKYC) | **Method:** REAL_TIME_API | **Turnaround:** PT5M
**Purpose:** KYC_COMPLIANCE | **Consent:** AADHAAR_EKYC

### Structural conventions

- Synchronous flow — aggregateResult VERIFIED already at on_confirm
- issuedCredentials (W3C VC) present in on_confirm contractAttributes
- on_status confirms the stable VERIFIED state and records the settlement
- Subject (Priya Sharma) introduced at init under Aadhaar eKYC consent

### Consideration lifecycle

| Call | status.code | price |
|---|---|---|
| catalog (on_discover) | *(none)* | ₹150 |
| on_select | PENDING | ₹150 |
| init | PENDING | ₹150 |
| on_init | QUOTED | ₹150 |
| confirm / on_confirm / on_status | ACTIVE | ₹150 |

### Quick-start: environment setup

1. Import **VS_Environment.json** and select the environment.
2. Set `base_url`, `requesting_np_uri`, `provider_np_uri`, and `auth_token`.
3. Run folders 01–10 in order.

variable.description: Provider NP (BPP) endpoint — set per environment
Requesting NP (BAP) callback URI — set per environment
Provider NP (BPP) URI — set per environment
Requesting NP network identifier (maps to bapId in Beckn context)
Provider NP network identifier (maps to bppId in Beckn context)
Confirm exact domain prefix with network team
Confirm exact value with network registry team
UUID — regenerate for separate test runs
Assigned by Provider NP at on_select
Aadhaar number — never store plaintext; handle server-side

item.name: 01 — discover
item.description: Requesting NP (GreenMove) discovers identity verification services.

header.description: Network-issued JWT — set before running the collection.

request.description:
**discover** — Requesting NP → Gateway

GreenMove EV Fleet Operations filters for IDENTITY verification resources with textSearch hint 'Aadhaar eKYC'. schemaContext included (catalog phase).

item.name: 02 — on_discover
item.description: Provider NP (IDVerify Solutions) returns its identity verification catalog.

header.description: Network-issued JWT — set before running the collection.

request.description:
**on_discover** — Provider NP → Requesting NP

IDVerify Solutions returns its catalog. Requesting NP selects `offer-vs-identity-instant-001` (₹150/request, PT5M, PREMIUM tier).

item.name: 03 — select
item.description: Requesting NP originates DRAFT contract for the identity verification offer.

header.description: Network-issued JWT — set before running the collection.

request.description:
**select** — Requesting NP → Provider NP

DRAFT Contract with identity commitment (1 verification). Minimal participant at this stage — no PII, no subject reference yet.

item.name: 04 — on_select
item.description: Provider NP assigns contract id and returns PENDING pricing.

header.description: Network-issued JWT — set before running the collection.

request.description:
**on_select** — Provider NP → Requesting NP

Provider NP assigns `{{contract_id}}`. PENDING consideration ₹150.

item.name: 05 — init
item.description: Requesting NP submits Aadhaar eKYC subject reference, purpose, and consent.

header.description: Network-issued JWT — set before running the collection.

request.description:
**init** — Requesting NP → Provider NP

Requesting NP introduces subject (Priya Sharma, masked Aadhaar), purpose (KYC_COMPLIANCE), and Aadhaar eKYC consent reference. The actual Aadhaar number is handled server-side — only masked reference and the consent token flow through the Beckn message.

header.description: Network-issued JWT — set before running the collection.

request.description:
**on_init** — Provider NP → Requesting NP

QUOTED consideration (₹150 UPI UPFRONT). Payment instructions out-of-band.

item.name: 07 — confirm
item.description: Requesting NP confirms the contract with payment authorisation.

header.description: Network-issued JWT — set before running the collection.

request.description:
**confirm** — Requesting NP → Provider NP

ACTIVE consideration with ICICI UPI payment authorisation (₹150). Provider NP initiates real-time Aadhaar eKYC immediately on receipt.

item.name: 08 — on_confirm  ★ KYC Verified (Synchronous)
item.description: Provider NP returns VERIFIED result synchronously — KYC complete at on_confirm.

header.description: Network-issued JWT — set before running the collection.

request.description:
**on_confirm** — Provider NP → Requesting NP

Synchronous result: aggregateResult VERIFIED within PT5M SLA. Performance record included (UIDAI eKYC response hash as evidence). issuedCredentials carries a W3C VC pointing to the signed KYC certificate. GreenMove can immediately proceed with driver onboarding.

item.name: 09 — status
item.description: Requesting NP polls to confirm stable state (optional for sync use cases).

header.description: Network-issued JWT — set before running the collection.

request.description:
**status** — Requesting NP → Provider NP

Status poll to confirm the stable VERIFIED state and retrieve the final settlement record. Optional for synchronous use cases where on_confirm already carries the result.

item.name: 10 — on_status  ★ Stable Verified State
item.description: Provider NP confirms VERIFIED state with settlement record.

header.description: Network-issued JWT — set before running the collection.

request.description:
**on_status** — Provider NP → Requesting NP

Stable VERIFIED result with settlement COMPLETE. W3C VC credential valid for 1 year (credentialExpiresAt 2027-05-15).
